top_patterns.description: Starts with a personal affirmation or realization, then invites engagement or action.
top_patterns.structure_template: I [achievement/realization]. [Message of worth/encouragement]. [Call to action or link].
example_quotes: You are enough. That truth changed everything.
If this resonates, start small. Reach out today.

top_patterns.description: Shares a personal story or insight, then distills a lesson or advice.
example_quotes: I learned the hard way that achievement doesn’t heal you.
Most people think happiness fades with age. The research says it returns.

top_patterns.description: Begins with a quote or external idea, then reflects or personalizes.
top_patterns.structure_template: I read/think about [quote]. It reminds me that [personal reflection].
top_patterns.when_it_appears: Frequent in captions about growth and awareness
example_quotes: This quote reminds me why I’ve always been willing to take the long way.
Ted Turner said he spent his life climbing the mountain...

archetypal_structures.formula: You are enough. [Encouragement]. [Link or call to action].
example_quotes: You are already enough. Visit the link in bio.
Remember, you don’t have to earn your worth.
I learned the hard way that achievement doesn’t heal you.
Most of my life, I chased validation outside myself.

archetypal_structures.emotional_job: Connect external wisdom with personal growth
example_quotes: This quote reminds me that what I’m moving through might help others.
Happiness comes down to three simple things.

language_habits.sentence_length_profile: Mostly short, punchy sentences with occasional longer reflections
language_habits.line_break_style: Line breaks used to emphasize key points or separate ideas

example_quotes: You don’t have to earn your worth.
I thought I was lost but really, I was just disconnected from my values.
Most of my life, I chased validation outside myself.
Take 15 minutes tonight and write down your core values.

anti_patterns: Calls to action that lack specificity
Overuse of external quotes without personal insight

synthesis_notes.what_this_batch_says_about_current_voice: Blake’s current voice emphasizes authenticity, self-worth, and practical growth, with a focus on vulnerability and connection.
synthesis_notes.what_changed_vs_older_voice: More direct calls to action, personal stories, and emphasis on mental health and self-acceptance.
